Q: How do I track my order? 
A: You can track your order by following these steps: 
   1. Log in to your ShopEase account 
   2. Go to "My Orders" section 
   3. Click on the order you want to track 
   4. You will see the current status and location 
   You can also track using the tracking link 
   sent to your registered email.

You can reach ShopEase support through various channels, including phone, email, live chat, and the help center. 

To speak to a human, you can try the following options:

1. Phone: Call our toll-free number 1800-123-4567 between 9 AM and 9 PM.
2. Live Chat: Visit our website or app and click on the live chat icon to start a conversation with a support agent.
3. Email: Send an email to support@shopease.com, and our team will respond within 24 hours.

Please note that our customer support hours are from Monday to Sunday, 9 AM to 9 PM IST.

Q: How do I create an account? 
A: To create a ShopEase account: 
   1. Visit www.shopease.com 
   2. Click "Sign Up" button 
   3. Enter your name, email, and phone number 
   4. Create a strong password 
   5. Verify your email address 
   6. Your account is ready to use
